task_description: Search for talent market data in the AI field, analyzing talent supply and demand, salary levels, and hiring trends.
prompt: Please search for information on the AI talent market in China in 2026 and generate a talent market analysis report, including: 1) Current AI talent supply and demand; 2) Salary levels by sub-field (large language models, multimodal AI, embodied intelligence, etc.); 3) Talent distribution across major cities; 4) Hiring trends and recommendations.
